description.zh-Hans: 使用时间动画分层噪波和基于高度的垂直分布生成滚动地面雾气。产生连续的雾场，带有缕状细节，而非离散粒子。
description.en: Generates rolling ground fog using time-animated layered noise with height-based vertical distribution. Produces continuous mist fields with wispy detail, not discrete particles.

triggers.zh-Hans: 雾气, 雾, 薄雾, 烟霭, 氛围
triggers.en: fog, mist, haze, atmospheric, rolling fog

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成滚动雾气效果，带时间动画和高度衰减，可用于游戏场景的氛围雾效。
exampleUsage.en: Generates rolling ground fog with time animation and height falloff for game scene atmosphere.
